creator: majo-bugs.freebsd.org@cerny.sk
text:
Gitlab-ce fails to build with KERBEROS option turned off with the following error:

===>  Patching for gitlab-ce-15.10.6
===>   gitlab-ce-15.10.6 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/ruby31 - found
===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/www/gitlab-ce/files/extra-patch-Gemfile-kerberos-off
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to Gemfile.rej
===>  FAILED Applying extra patch /usr/ports/www/gitlab-ce/files/extra-patch-Gemfile-kerberos-off
*** Error code 1
